name: Behavior XP Ledger (ProgressionEvent model + idempotent events)
notes: Replaces JSON blob with proper event sourcing. Foundation for missions and rewards.

name: Wire all routes into event service (chat/orientation/tasks/certs/portfolio)
notes: Existing routes award XP through new ledger. Covers tickets 4-7 from backlog.

name: Weekly Mission Board (student UI + API)
notes: Students see and complete weekly missions tied to real product behavior.

name: Teacher Kudos system
notes: Teachers can issue kudos tied to professional behaviors. Students see recognition.

name: Practical Reward Unlocks
notes: Priority resume review, mock interview slots, portfolio spotlight. Requires partnership with staff.

name: Dashboard Copy Refresh (shift from chat-centric to behavior-centric)
notes: Update empty states and helper copy across dashboard. Quick win after XP ledger.

name: E2E Tests with Playwright
notes: Critical user flows: login, chat, dashboard, orientation. Only remaining arch audit item.

name: Background Job Queue for fire-and-forget work
notes: Replace .then() chains with proper queue. Benefits chat post-processing, alert sync, email.

name: Migrate 28 components to typed API client
notes: Replace raw fetch() calls with api.get/post. Incremental adoption already possible.

name: Alert sync background cron
notes: Create /api/internal/alerts/sync cron endpoint. Alert sync removed from renders, needs periodic refresh.

name: Rate limiting on document endpoints
notes: Wire RateLimitEntry to /api/documents routes. Cache exhaustion mitigation.

name: Retire legacy /api/forms/download route
notes: Migrate OrientationFormDetail to use /api/documents/download. Remove filename-based download.

name: Streaming downloads (avoid buffering)
notes: Return signed Supabase URLs instead of proxying file bytes. Reduces server memory per download.

name: Normalize progression state to DB columns
notes: Replace JSON blob with proper columns. Eliminates parse/serialize overhead and enables SQL queries.

name: Mobile responsive polish
notes: Fix remaining mobile breakpoint issues across courses, teacher dashboard, document browser.

name: Student onboarding wizard improvements
notes: Guided first-run experience after registration. Currently just redirects to /chat.

name: Add Zod to remaining routes (incrementally)
notes: Apply schemas to the ~30 routes not yet using Zod. Low urgency since withErrorHandler catches crashes.
